body_txt: Sometimes, there's a character that does things differently than others would expect of another character, such as when the Tyrant Takes the Helm or there's a Bait-and-Switch Tyrant . He will be called out on it, being told that the other character would not behave this way. To that, he will simply answer with the Stock Phrase "I am not him". He is not that other guy, and everyone will have to learn to accept that. I Am Not My Father is a family-centered Sub-Trope . Compare I Am What I Am . Not to be confused with I Am Not Shazam , I Am Not Spock , I Am Not Leonard Nimoy , I Am Not Weasel or Accidental Misnaming . This is not the inversion of Actually, I Am Him , either.
